content_summary: This file provides an extension to the CoreGraphics.CGSize struct, allowing it to conform to the CustomStringConvertible protocol. This protocol enables the CGSize struct to provide a human-readable description of itself, which can be used for logging or other purposes. The description is a string in the format "widthxheight".
fingerprint_contribution: The contribution of this file to the final device fingerprint is likely related to providing a way to describe the device's screen size. By converting the CGSize struct to a string, this extension enables the inclusion of screen size information in the device fingerprint. This information can be used to identify or distinguish devices based on their screen size, which can be a useful characteristic in device fingerprinting.
